  "image_summary": "Interior bedroom view: central white paneled door slightly ajar, dark-wood dresser with a large flat-screen TV on the left, and a textured right-side wall with a light switch and small hook. A white floor outlet in the central wall has a black cord running left to the dresser. Walls are painted gray with white baseboard. Overall scene is low clutter with traditional-style furniture; lighting appears mixed (room ambient plus reflected lamp). Spatial layout: dresser/TV near the camera left (~1.1–1.3 m), textured right wall close on the right (~0.9 m), and the door set back (~2.2 m) in the center."

  "image_summary": "Interior bedroom view: central white paneled door slightly ajar, dark-wood dresser with a large flat-screen TV on the left, and a textured right-side wall with a light switch and small hook. A white floor outlet in the central wall has a black cord running left to the dresser. Walls are painted gray with white baseboard. Overall scene is low clutter with traditional-style furniture; lighting appears mixed (room ambient plus reflected lamp). Spatial layout: dresser/TV near the camera left (~1.1–1.3 m), textured right wall close on the right (~0.9 m), and the door set back (~2.2 m) in the center."
